name: Zoodiac Barrage
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>十</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>二</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>に</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>会</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>局</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Elemental Triangle of the Twelve Zodiac Beasts
desc: You can target 1 face-up card you control; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Zoodiac" monster from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Zoodiac Barrage" once per turn. If this card is destroyed by a card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Zoodiac" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card from your GY to that Xyz Monster as Xyz Material.
eff: You can target 1 face-up card you control; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Zoodiac" monster from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Zoodiac Barrage" once per turn. If this card is destroyed by a card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Zoodiac" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card from your GY to that Xyz Monster as Xyz Material.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Attaches itself from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
